description: A playlist resource represents a YouTube playlist.

kind.description: Identifies the API resource's type. Value is youtube#playlist.

id.description: The ID that YouTube uses to uniquely identify the playlist.

snippet.description: Basic details about the playlist such as its title, description, and thumbnails.

publishedAt.description: The date and time that the playlist was created.

channelId.description: The ID of the channel that published the playlist.

thumbnails.description: A map of thumbnail images associated with the playlist.

channelTitle.description: The channel title of the channel that the video belongs to.

tags.description: Keyword tags associated with the playlist.

defaultLanguage.description: The language of the text in the playlist resource's snippet.title and snippet.description properties.

status.description: The status object contains status information for the playlist.

contentDetails.description: The contentDetails object contains information about the playlist content.

itemCount.description: The number of videos in the playlist.

title: Playlist
